title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at Zoho Corporation Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at Zoho Corporation Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Zoho Corporation Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Dhanbad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Zoho Corporation Holdings Services:
Zoho Corporation Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zoho Corporation Holdings Services!
